title: senecio boliviensis
intro: Senecio boliviensis, also known as Bolivian groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio boliviensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio boliviensis can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
